iran_nuke.notes: Oman breakthrough (Feb 27): Iran agreed to never stockpile enriched uranium and full IAEA verification. No weapons-grade enrichment signals. Nuclear track de-escalated. Conventional war ongoing but no nuclear escalation.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 13 of war. IRGC directly fired on and stopped two commercial vessels in Hormuz (first direct IRGC naval engagement). Three cargo ships hit by unknown projectiles in/near Hormuz. Iranian drone struck fuel tanks at port of Salalah, Oman. Iran struck 9 countries including Gulf states. Iran drone hit UK base in Cyprus. Trump says war could be 'soon' over but threatens escalation if oil shipments restricted. Oil >$100/bbl. IEA releasing reserves. No diplomatic engagement visible.

israel_lebanon.notes: Escalated to IMMINENT zone (52%). 70 killed in Israeli strikes on Thursday alone. Two faculty members killed in strike on Lebanese University campus. 800,000+ displaced, 680+ total killed. Israel strikes heart of Beirut — killed Hamas official. 210+ Hezbollah rockets since March 2. Sweeping evacuation order for southern Lebanon (25 miles). Reuters: Israel signals 'long campaign.'

turkey.notes: Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2 incidents). NATO Article 4 discussions. Erdogan warns Iran but insists Turkey is 'on side of peace.' NATO forces building up off coast of Cyprus (Russian ambassador protested). Iranian drone hit UK base in Cyprus — proximity to Turkish interests. No Article 5 or mobilization.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan border buildup. Pakistan deployed army to Gilgit-Skardu to suppress pro-Iran protests — Shiite demonstrators attacked UN observer offices in Azad Kashmir. Conflict remains Pakistan internal/India-adjacent, not bilateral. No nuclear rhetoric.

russia.notes: Russia calls on US/Israel to stop attacks and negotiate. Kremlin signals intent to expand demands on Ukraine/NATO (Peskov). Europe alarmed US spending weapons in ME that were earmarked for Ukraine. Russia continues arms supply to Iran. No direct ME involvement. Occupies ~20% Ukraine.

china.notes: Chinese air force activity around Taiwan fell sharply — nearly 2-week pause in flights (reason unknown). Flights resumed March 13. Trump delaying Taiwan arms sale to smooth Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). De-escalatory posture ahead of summit. Zone downgraded from elevated to deterrent.

north_korea.notes: Kim Jong Un inspected weapons factory, tested new pistol with daughter. DPRK condemns US-South Korea drills as 'provocative and aggressive war rehearsal.' No missile or nuclear tests. Conventional modernization focus continues.

top_signals: IRGC directly fired on commercial vessels in Strait of Hormuz — first direct IRGC naval engagement
Three cargo ships hit by unknown projectiles in/near Hormuz
Iranian drone struck fuel tanks at port of Salalah, Oman — Qatar condemns as 'dangerous escalation'
Iran struck targets in 9 countries: Bahrain, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Cyprus
Iran drone hit UK military base in Cyprus — NATO proximity
70 killed in Israeli strikes in Lebanon on Thursday — faculty killed at Lebanese University
Israel signals 'long campaign' in Lebanon — 800,000+ displaced, 680+ killed
Trump: war could end 'soon' but threatens escalation if Iran restricts oil shipments

new: IRGC directly engaged commercial shipping in Hormuz (escalation from proxy to direct action)
Iran drone strike on Salalah, Oman — Gulf state infrastructure targeted
Iran drone hit UK base in Cyprus — NATO member territory struck
70 killed in Lebanon strikes on single day (March 12)
zone_changes: china: elevated (13%) → deterrent (10%) — sustained de-escalation, flights paused

latest_news.headline: IRGC directly fires on and stops two commercial vessels in Strait of Hormuz
Three cargo ships hit by unknown projectiles in/near Strait of Hormuz
Iranian drone damages fuel tanks at port of Salalah, Oman
Iran drone strikes UK military base in Cyprus
70 killed in Israeli strikes in Lebanon on Thursday — Lebanese University hit
Israel signals 'long campaign' in Lebanon — 800,000 displaced, 680+ killed
China halts military flights around Taiwan for nearly 2 weeks — reason unknown
Russia calls on US/Israel to stop Iran attacks; Kremlin signals expanded NATO demands

outlook: Iran conventional war and Israel-Lebanon front both at IMMINENT threshold. Key escalation: IRGC shifted from missile/drone attacks to directly engaging commercial shipping — first direct naval confrontation. Iran now striking targets in 9 countries including a NATO member (Cyprus/UK base). Oil supply under severe pressure. China notably de-escalating ahead of Trump-Xi summit. No nuclear signals on any track. Watch for: oil crossing $120/bbl, Hezbollah 100+ rocket barrage, Turkey response to Cyprus strike, US response to IRGC direct naval engagement.
